scope.target: Inventory current AI assets and define taxonomy
constraints: Capture current structure before schema design

inputs.architecture_target: Document the current AI asset landscape so canonical schema design can be based on explicit taxonomy instead of assumptions
user_constraints: Proceed stage by stage with commits

steps: Grouped .ai prompts into command families, review/validation prompt packages, shared fragments, examples, and rules
Grouped .ai scripts into review, pattern-specific, environment, and generation buckets
Defined the initial portable AI asset taxonomy
validation: Every existing repo-local skill is represented in the inventory
Prompt inventory distinguishes portable fragments from wrapper-tied assets
Taxonomy fields are explicit enough to feed Stage 2 schema work
deferred_items: Translate the taxonomy into canonical schema and directory structure
Map each asset type to wrapper targets

results.summary: Completed Stage 1 inventory and taxonomy definition for portable AI assets.
